sourceName: User-pasted Pizano's Chicago Loop menu and allergen notes

sections.name: Location info
items: Dine in and carryout: Sunday through Thursday 11 AM-11 PM; Friday and Saturday 11 AM-11 PM

sections.name: Appetizers
items: Garlic Bread - fresh bread smothered with garlic butter, side of marinara
Cheesy Garlic Bread - covered with melted cheese, side of marinara
Wisconsin Cheese Curds - deep fried, served with marinara or spicy ranch
Fried Pickles - golden brown with spicy ranch for dipping
Fried Calamari - lightly breaded and seasoned with lemon and marinara
Cheese Sticks - golden brown with marinara for dipping

sections.name: Salads and pizza
items: Pizano Salad - lettuce, fresh vegetables, croutons, homemade Italian dressing
Caesar Salad - romaine, croutons, parmesan, classic dressing
Chopped Salad - chopped lettuce, basil, bacon, grilled chicken, tomato, mozzarella cheese, scallions, homemade Italian
Deep Dish Pizza - cheese pizza, cheese sausage or pepperoni pizza, meat lovers

sections.name: Allergen notes from user-provided source work
items: Peanuts or Tree Nuts: We do not have any peanuts or tree nuts in our pizzerias, and all of our homemade products are made without these ingredients.
A few items, such as the vanilla ice cream and chocolate chip cookie dough, are made in a facility where peanuts and tree nuts are present.
Gluten-free pizza dough may contain traces of almond and coconut.

notes: Stored from user-pasted menu and follow-up allergen source work so future rescans can reuse it without refetching the site.
This combines the menu paste with the specific allergen notes the user wanted preserved.
